name: secret-guard
description: Stops a live secret from ever landing in source. A PreToolUse hook scans the new content of every Edit/Write for real-looking credentials — AWS keys, GitHub/OpenAI/Stripe/Slack tokens, Google keys, private keys, hardcoded api_key literals — and blocks the write before it hits a tracked file. Allows .env files, placeholders, and env reads; fails open.
